# Accuracy: FREYJOSE is in Ngong, Kajiado County, Kenya
# Contact: +254715505526 (WhatsApp), info@freyjose.ac.ke
# Departments: ICT, Business & Accounting, Beauty & Cosmetology, Hospitality, Driving & Mechanical
# Certification Levels: Level 3 (1yr), Level 4 (1yr), Level 5 (18mo), Level 6 (24mo)
# Admissions: KCSE/O-Level required, Payment plans available

# Main institution: CollegeOrUniversity + WebSite schemas (structured data on root layout)
